posts.text:
From New York to Paris, support for the world’s Mamdanis and Mélenchons is surging. 

On this week’s episode of The Insider we examine what they want, why they’re winning votes and how they could alter policies and politics across the West https://www.economist.com/insider/the-insider/the-new-socialists-how-dangerous-are-they?taid=6a22d1b3a7e6970001d4954f&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

posts.text:
If the KOSPI drops to levels last seen a few weeks ago, their entire financial system will fail, and they’ll probably need an IMF bailout. 

Governments used to try and avoid bubbles because of the consequences. Now, governments just blow bigger bubbles to bail out the prior ones…
posts.author: hkuppy
